headline: ROCE Insights For Amazon.com
summary: Looking at Q2, Amazon.com (NASDAQ: AMZN) earned $5.84 billion, a 46.48% increase from the preceding quarter. Amazon.com also posted a total of $88.91 billion in sales, a 17.84% increase since Q1. In Q1, Amazon.com earned $3.99 billion, and total sales reached $75.45 billion.

headline: ROCE Insights For Walmart
summary: Looking at Q2, Walmart (NYSE: WMT) earned $6.06 billion, a 15.98% increase from the preceding quarter. Walmart also posted a total of $137.74 billion in sales, a 2.32% increase since Q1. Walmart earned $5.22 billion, and sales totaled $134.62 billion in Q1.
